title: Campylotropis cytisoides
taxonomy: Campylotropis cytisoides is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a member of the subfamily Faboideae and tribe Psoraleeae. Campylotropis cytisoides is native to the Himalayan region and parts of China. The plant is often classified as a type of legume due to its fruit and leaf characteristics. Within the family Fabaceae, Campylotropis cytisoides is further categorized based on its morphology and genetic makeup.
